title: JOIKIT 12 PCS 9 x 6 x 2.5 inch Plastic Oval Basket, Small Food Serving Baskets, Bread Bin Basket, Food Storage Basket for Restaurant, Kitchen, Display
features: RELIABLE QUALITY - Our plastic oval basket are crafted from high-quality plastic, with a smooth surface and sturdy weaving that not easy breakage. They are easy to clean and designed for long-lasting use.
PERFECT SIZE - Our small gift baskets have specific dimensions of 23 x 15 x 6.5 cm, making them convenient for storage, easy to stack, and space-saving when not in use.
WHAT YOU GET - You will receive 12 pieces of bread bin basket in a unique yellow, oval shape. They are lightweight and designed to provide an excellent user experience.

VENTILATION AND BREATHABILITY - The food serving baskets feature a perforated design to ensure air circulation, allowing them to dry quickly after cleaning with water. Ideal for storing fruits and other food.

VERSATILE APPLICATIONS - These plastic oval basket are perfect for storing bread, fruits, snacks, tissues, small items, etc. They can be placed in the living room, kitchen, or dining room for various uses.
description: ABOUT US Do you enjoy shopping for the most desirable products? Choose JOIKIT! JOIKIT is professional at providing what you need for a better and happier life with affordable prices and amazing quality. JOIKIT always aims at providing better design more satisfying service. We promise to make your purchase worry-free! WHY JOIKIT? ✓ These plastic oval basket are of moderate size, finely crafted, easy to arrange, and stackable, making them excellent containers for loading fruits and food. ✓ The bottom of these small gift baskets is sturdy, with a smooth surface and a clever perforated design for ventilation, ensuring optimal breathability. ✓ Shaped in an oval form with yellow colors, these bread bin basket are perfect for decorative displays. ✓ You will receive 12 pieces of yellow food serving baskets with dimensions of 23 x 15 x 6.5cm, robudt and reusable. DETAILED INFORMATION: Material: plastic Size: 23 x 15 x 6.5cm Color: yellow PACKAGE CONTENT: 12 x plastic oval basket
